column6: There are no words to describe how appreciative and grateful I am for meeting and receiving my life-changing therapy from Kenta and OneSelf Therapy
column7: I have a history of neck and back pain from practicing dentistry for the past 9 years
column8: During these 9 years, I have unsuccessfully gone through various means to relieve my pain which have included seeing two different physical therapists, two different chiropractors, an acupuncturist, weight training to increase the strength in my neck and back, and not to mention numerous massage therapists
column9: What makes Kenta different from all of the massage therapists out there is his understanding of the anatomy and physiology of the body
column10: When I indicate an area of pain he will always explain the muscles involved that is causing the pain while he is treating the area
column11: After the session, he would suggests specific exercises to help with those specific areas
column12: Every session he brings different methods and treatment which leads to better results than the last session
column13: One of the most important things that he made me realize was the fact that I should not only get a massage when I am stiff or sore but to maintain a therapeutic schedule thereby preventing the stiffness and soreness from appearing with greater intensity and frequency
column14: His three appointment therapy sessions spaced out between 11-13 days apart has greatly improved my physical health
column15: I have also noticed that my asthma has improved after each session due to Kenta's ability to resolve the tightness within my respiratory muscles
column16: With that being said, not only is he looking out for your physical and mental well-being but he is also providing his services at a reasonable cost
column17: Finally, there have been times when I needed to see him before my scheduled appointment due to a long day at work and everytime he has been flexible and accommodating to my needs
column18: I highly recommend Kenta and OneSelf Therapy to anyone who is looking for a massage therapist
column19: Not only is Kenta my massage therapist but I consider him a close friend now due to my trust and respect that I have for him
